name: Jackie
message:
I truly hope that you are aware of the inspiration you are giving & the confidence you're creating in women! Every step you take is a beautifully magical milestone & I THANK YOU IMMENSELY for sharing your journey!
I am now training for MINE! 
#AT2027OrBUST

name: Kee
message: Glad you’re staying safe! Wonderful views! Especially those fries!!! lol

name: Mom
message: Very impressed with your glass half full comments. This is so you!

name: Jayme Clarksville TN
message: You’re in my state!  Good old Rocky Top (woo!). I discovered your story on a random scroll on your fella’s Facebook Reels.  I am inspired at 47 to do hard things!  I’ll be keeping up from now on. Praying for your safety and success!

name: Lynsey
message: Hey, I hope youre okay! I saw you posted every single day for 23 days and now you havent posted sense the 20th. Hope youre well!
